g.text: t=0 Node A learns new info (e.g., 'B is down')
t=1 A gossips to 3 random peers u2192 4 nodes know
t=2 Each knowing node gossips to 3 random peers u2192 ~13 nodes know
t=3 Exponential spread complete u2014 all 16 nodes know

text.tspan: u2022 O(log N) rounds to reach every node u2014 even at thousands of nodes,
u2022 each node sends only constant traffic per round (e.g., 3 peers)
u2192 total traffic ~ N u00b7 fanout per round, not O(Nu00b2)
u2022 robust to failures: if some gossip messages drop, the rumor
u2022 eventually consistent: no guarantee of *when* a node learns,
